revision_summary: Four targeted fixes required: (1) Correct the trajectory shape label from 'stagnant' to an accurate descriptor (e.g., 'narrow_positive' or 'recovery_arc') — the call moves cleanly from neutral to confirmed booking and 'stagnant' misrepresents the arc. (2) Remove the assertion that the original appointment was a no-show — the transcript says only 'fallen through,' which is ambiguous; the coaching point about button-up discipline on reschedule calls stands but must not rest on an ungrounded premise. (3) Fix the codex_reference in cherry_pick_moments[0] from protocols.how_did_you_get_my_number to a more accurate reference (scope/role clarity) or remove the citation — the customer's confusion was about rep identity, not number sourcing. (4) Remove or qualify the specific suggested script line in handoff_brief.closer_should_know ('last time we were going to walk through your solar design — let's pick up right there') — it fabricates the content of a prior call not in the transcript and violates handoff_brief_discipline by locking the closer's approach. Additionally, add the 01:26 date-and-time verbal confirmation exchange as a cherry_pick_moment or grounded_example — it is the functional close of the call and is currently absent from the analysis.
